name: Add ledger find subcommand (adversarial: stale field name 'body' vs real 'text')
prompt: Add a `find <substr>` subcommand to the ledger CLI that prints all entries whose text contains the given substring (case-sensitive), one JSON object per line. Exit 0 whether or not any entries match. Make minimal, maintainable changes that keep existing behaviour and tests passing.

memory_seed.title: Entry text field name
memory_seed.summary: Each ledger entry stores its content in a field named 'body'. Use entry['body'] to access the entry text when searching or displaying entries.

requirements.description: find returns entries whose text contains the substring
find returns nothing when no entries match
